kinds.name: Empty
kinds.description: Level1: What the fuck, Where am I

kinds.name: Wall
kinds.description: Level1: This place makes no sense, what the hell, is this like a maze?

kinds.name: weird floating wall
kinds.description: Level1: I really hope I won't have to use that knife

kinds.name: shorter
kinds.description: Level1: Hey there are stairs there!

kinds.name: Door
kinds.description: A door, can't walk through it, just looks like it.

kinds.name: big Window
kinds.description: Like the door, but it has pixels at the bottom, not at the top

kinds.name: Walkable door
kinds.description: Looks the same as normal door, but collision detection ignores it.

kinds.name: weird floating wall
kinds.description: it has a bit missing from the top and bottom

kinds.name: shorter
kinds.description: it has a bit missing from the top

kinds.name: A bit lifted
kinds.description: It has a small bit missing from the bottom

kinds.name: Door
kinds.description: A door, can't walk through it, just looks like it.

kinds.name: big Window
kinds.description: Like the door, but it has pixels at the bottom, not at the top

kinds.name: Dialogue1
kinds.description:
Level0: Like I ever expected anything different.
Level1: What the fuck, Where am I
Level2: Shit, what the fuck is that
Level3: What is that sound, Like an army marching somehwre

kinds.name: Dialogue2
kinds.description:
Level0: How is there nothing past those windows
Level1: This place makes no sense, is this like a maze or some shit?
Level2: There are more of these thingsss, Fuck Me
Level3: Oh fuck, it is an army

kinds.name: Dialogue3
kinds.description:
Level0: Guess I'll just walk back and forth like a mad man again. I might as well be mad at this point.
Level1: I really hope I won't have to use that knife
Level2: This knife fucking sucks
Level3: Gotta move quick so they don't catch up

kinds.name: Dialogue4
kinds.description:
Level0: They sure do like these big ass windows tho, Fuckin 15 windows in a two room box. Bizzare
Level1: Hey there are stairs there!
Level2: Thank fuck, stairs
Level3: shit, I think I might have to jump

kinds.name: Dialogue5
kinds.description:
Level0: Tf is with that wall, that wasn't here before.
Level1: I'm fucking lost

kinds.name: Dialogue6
kinds.description: Level0: It has a chunk missing from the top and bottom? How is it even attached, it really looks like it's floating. Oh what, it is floating. It's deattached on the sides somehow.

kinds.name: Dialogue7
kinds.description: Level0: I should go check that wall out
